name: Automated SWAPI Regression Tests
on: [push]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install Newman CLI
        run: npm install -g newman

      - name: Run Postman Automation Suite
        run: |
          newman run "Star Wars API Data Testing.postman_collection.json" -e "SWAPI Error Mock.postman_environment.json"
